title: ImUi ID Stack Diagnostics v1
problem: Fret IMUI now supports Dear ImGui-style label identity grammar, but the remaining identity footguns are still mostly visible only through transient tracing warnings. This lane makes dynamic-list and duplicate-key identity problems observable through the diagnostics snapshot while keeping render-pass/evaluation tokens internal and avoiding `test_id` inference.

repro.summary: Use the runtime identity tests and the IMUI authoring proof to confirm duplicate keyed lists and unkeyed reorder warnings are captured as structured diagnostics.
commands: cargo nextest run -p fret-ui --features diagnostics identity_diagnostics --no-fail-fast
cargo nextest run -p fret-imui --features diagnostics identity_diagnostics --no-fail-fast

gates.name: runtime-identity-diagnostics
gates.command: cargo nextest run -p fret-ui --features diagnostics identity_diagnostics --no-fail-fast

gates.name: imui-identity-diagnostics
gates.command: cargo nextest run -p fret-imui --features diagnostics identity_diagnostics --no-fail-fast

continue_policy.notes: Continue this lane for structured IMUI/runtime identity diagnostics. Start narrower follow-ons for `test_id` inference, localization, column-owned sortable/resizable identity, or public runtime identity APIs.
